item.title: Love heals & what an incredible transformation - Now she has found her forever home :)
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: My sweet ex-husband is dying tomorrow
item.description:
This is Shawn. Shawn and I were married from 2014-2020. He was an amazing father to our daughter, and an even more amazing Papa Bear to my two older daughters.
Shawn was so kind. He was the kindest, most gentle, most generous man I had ever met. I had to marry him.
I loved doing life with him, but ultimately we were better together as friends than as spouses. He LOVED being a father.
On January 30 he had a major stroke and went to the hospital. Overnight he had a second major stroke that put him in a coma. The neurologist was not sure if or when he would come to, but let us know his life on the other side of this coma was extremely poor quality. He would be blind, have paralysis in his limbs, may not know who we are, would need a feeding tube, and be kept in a nursing home indefinitely. His mother made the hard choice to bring hospice in after he spent 2 weeks in a coma.
I want to remember him as the father he was. He was so loving and so proud of his daughters. He loved his family and friends with all his heart. I'm so proud to have known him and shared 8 years of my life with him. I love you, Shawn Paul.
item.dc:creator: chickensareawesome

item.title: "Stuck in the Back"
item.description: I did not write these tweets, but according to the twitter bio of the guy who did, he "Was not stuck in a hotel" and "wrote the story for fun". I don't mind, though. It elicited a genuine anxiety response in me. Especially photos of the dark hallways and the single stack of chairs.

item.title: "why concentrate on race?" a response
item.description:
Yale Professor Paul Weiss, and writer and activist James Baldwin debated about racial discrimination in the USA on The Dick Cavett Show. Paul believed James was too focused on the color of one's skin, and the obstacles.
This was Baldwin's answer. Baldwin's essays such as Notes of a Native Son, and novels like Another Country and Go Tell it On The Mountain, are some of the best ever written
item.dc:creator: EnglightenMe

item.title: Hello! I’m a Vet Tech, here’s some pictures I’ve taken and a little about them.
item.description:
This is Daisy, she was a spay that absolutely loved to be held like a baby. My coworker caught me sitting with her in downtime lol, she just needed some love **she’s just a sensitive flower and is bruised, her sutures are a-okay
teef
Sir Leo! I love this cat with my everything. Poor guy needed emergency surgery after being blocked. His owners weren’t the most... helpful. PSA- male cats are more susceptible to urinary blockages, if you notice them straining or not urinating, take them to an emergency clinic ASAP. It can be life threatening! If caught quickly, a urinary cath is placed and they can be on their way in a day or two with some medications.
This is Lucy! As you can see, she has a patch of hair that’s different from the rest of her. I won’t post the original picture and in depth story unless someone asks, but she had a strange case of necrotizing fasciitis, where her muscle and skin tissue basically just spontaneously died. Took a lot of TLC but she’s back to her happy self!
Originally thought she’d have a bald spot on her face, but to everyone’s surprise she grew in a darker golden, straight hair. Her owners are amazing people
This is Dakota, hes 14! He comes in for acupuncture. His mom recently adopted him after being in a shelter for most his life. She’s trying to make sure he’s comfortable
Beaux, an ornery lil bugger. He has an older brother that keeps I’m in line, and he keeps Bailey active
This guy had an anal gland abscess that had to be removed.. he could Houdini his way out of every cone and ruptured 2 sets of sutures. His parents found that kids sweatpants is the way to go lol
Cinnamon! Sweet baby
His name is milo! He’s a diabetic, so his mom boards him at the clinic when she’s in work trips. We always have riveting conversations
Ever seen a Golden Dachshund mix? Me neither lol, but she’s a sweetheart
Hank the Tank
His name was Eugene lol, he had a Westie terrier brother. They made a great odd pair
Staff dog Auddie, she’s so judgmental and I love her lol
Scarlet!!
Poor baby has PRAA. Enlarged heart causing megaesophagus, basically. She’s a doll and doesn’t know any different. She’s getting corrective surgery done here in a month or two
Shibbie the shiba, one of the most well mannered shibs I’ve ever met
Bauer is a mini Aussie with a ton of GI issues so we see him often, but he’s such a joy when he comes in
Donna had such a soulful face lol, poor thing
Gracie is such a block head and I love her, she’s very regal and has no time for silly games lol. In and out, or she’ll open the room doors and let herself out
If looks could kill...
Belle is 14 and trucking like she’s 5, sweet old lady!
Finnegan! Such a sweet little guy
Shameless selfie but this pup was scared to be put down, so I zipped her up and carried her with me lol. It let me be productive and have my hands and she was warm and cuddled. Win win
Sophie! Ball of energy
Delgado goes from hardass to goofball with one flick of the ears lol. He with stare intensely into your soul
Another Bailey! Sweet guy, sits on your feet asking for attention
I couldn’t get a good pic of this pup cause of how wiggly she was but she was adorable
KETCHUP!! His mom just brings him by sometimes to say hi. He has bad ear infections so again, frequent flier. Love this goofball
Stella, or “panther” as her dad calls her lol
My coworker loves frenchies and Boston’s, so we always hand them off to her to say hi. Little man decided to take a nap
Chili!! If I had to pick a favorite this would be the dog. He smiles and tippy taps and backs his butt up to you... honestly would do anything for this dog
Honey is such a curious pup! Can’t wait to see how big she is at her next appointment
Ginnie is another old sweetheart that was recently adopted. She has cancer. However, is loving her new life
Noodle tax, Dilly has now taken a liking to my hoodies and will peak his nose out while I’m doing stuff around the house :) Y’all have a good day and give your pets the scritches for me!
item.dc:creator: grrumble

item.title: Parenting and mental health photo dump
item.description:
1. #mindful_parenting
2. #theoggentleparent
3. I originally heard this said on the show Louie
4. #empathy
5. ❤️
6. #anxiety
7. Love this
8. #control
9. A good reminder
10. Raising strong daughters
11. Makes sense
12. ?
13. My bonus daughter would totally do something like this ?
14. But really though
15. ??‍♀️
16. ??‍♀️
17. On days that seem extra tough I try to remember this
18. ?
19. Haha fork knife #fortnite
20. The wooorrrsssttt
21. ?
22. ??????
23. The struggle is real when you have ADHD and are trying so hard to actively listen to your very excited kiddo’s never ending story #adhd
24. My bonus son loves to collect things
25. ?
26. Had this happen last year
27. My husband and I are so fortunate to have this type of relationship with his ex and her husband! Successful co-parenting
28. Ope
29. I like these
30. Haha yep
31. ❤️
32. ☀️
33. Daily reminder
34. ?
35. We’re all assholes sometimes and it’s okay to recognize that
36. ?
37. Happened more than once for sure
38.
39. Some days I do a better job at this than others ❤️
40. #mental_health
41. ?
42. Mr. Rogers was so great!
43. ❤️
44. ?
45. Love this so much
46. ??‍♀️
47. ?
48. The only way that we are on time to school every day is by getting there 20 minutes early ?
49. ?
